arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano shares the percentage chance Alexander Isak leaves Newcastle amid Liverpool and Arsenal links
arts.sum: Newcastle United are on cloud nine at the moment after winning the Carabao Cup. However, there’s undoubtedly a niggling issue in the back of many...

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Brentford – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Newcastle United return to Premier League action tonight when Brentford visit St James’ Park. Eddie Howe’s side celebrated Carabao Cup success before the international break, as the Magpies beat Liverpool at Wembley. Goals from Dan Burn and Alexander Isak sealed a 2-1 win for Newcastle. That win ended the club’s 70-year wait for a major […] The post Newcastle vs Brentford – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: One Newcastle United star still has a lot to prove despite Wembley heroics
arts.sum: One more needed to bring up 20 Premier League goals in successive seasons, something never achieved by any United striker. Definition of Isak according to the Oxford English Dictionary: brings goals to Newcastle.

arts.ttl: Strong push, Chelsea fear, dark horse - Newcastle United season finish predicted
arts.sum: Newcastle United's Carabao Cup final and the celebrations that followed can now be put to one side as focus turns to securing a Champions League finish to crown off a season for the ages. We therefore asked our Chronicle Live team to predict the remaining fixtures of the season to determine whether Newcastle make it into the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Newcastle Want to Sign ‘One of the Best Strikers in the World’, Offer Expected
arts.sum: Newcastle United have entered the race to sign the 25-year-old forward on a free transfer.

arts.ttl: Sandro Tonali lifts lid on AC Milan axe and Newcastle United sacrifice - 'I don't care' - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: Tonali has looked alive and alert on match days under Howe though this season and the dream midfield trio of Joelinton, the Italian star and Bruno Guimaraes has finally taken the Premier League by storm. Newcastle United star Tonali said to the Italian publication: "Once Pioli left me out because I had skipped both breakfast and the meeting.

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Brentford Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: In the first game since their Carabao Cup triumph, Newcastle host Brentford at St James’ Park on Wednesday evening. Ahead of the match, we’ve made our score prediction, provided our predi...

arts.ttl: Tino Livramento's Mo Salah secret after Newcastle United tactics left Liverpool with no answers
arts.sum: But Livramento let Chronicle Live into a little secret - he hasn't even watched back his defensive masterclass against Salah and has had no interest in poring over Wembley highlights. Livramento has also spoken of the moment Howe gave the players a crucial little bit of extra confidence after the 1-0 victory at West Ham during the build-up to the Carabao Cup final.

arts.ttl: Jamie O'Hara 'cringes' but his Newcastle United nightmare is just beginning
arts.sum: Not after hearing O'Hara's bizarre reaction to 300,000 Geordies coming out in force to celebrate Newcastle United ending a crippling wait to win a major domestic trophy. You would not have known that Jamie O'Hara once described winning the Carabao Cup as a 'proud moment' or that the former Spurs midfielder 'cried his eyes out' after being left out of the match day squad for the 2008 final.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United's dream defence for next season - £50m signing, Trippier call, Schar contract - Matty Hewitt - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: The Magpies have already secured a return to European football and will take part in the Europa Conference League next season after winning the Carabao Cup. You'd back Eddie Howe's side to be one of the favourites for that competition, especially given how well English sides have fared in previous editions of the tournament. It's no secret that Newcastle want to sign a right-sided centre-half to provide competition and cover for Fabian Schar, who we'll get onto a little later.
